## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff Delivery Org Audit Week, introduce pod realignment, and set expectations for Atlas implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pod realignment: Rebalancing accounts and structures to match skillsets, accommodate new hires, and prepare for strategy sprint handoffs.](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Atlas implementation: New AI-driven platform replacing AirOps; focus on learning and testing this week.](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Strategic reset: Shift from reactive to proactive client management; emphasis on clear strategies and roadmaps.](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
  - [Expectations: Learn Atlas, generate client-ready content, transition clients internally, and build strategic roadmaps.](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)

## Topics

### Pod Realignment and Structure Changes

  - [New managing directors, managers, and editors joined recently](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Pods realigned to match skillsets and create room for growth](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Preparation for strategy sprint account handoffs in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [Atlas implementation as part of programmatic platform transformation](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Goal: Share knowledge, deepen skillsets, and deliver "best hire" mindset](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Atlas Implementation and Training

  - [Atlas replacing AirOps as core workflow tool](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Training session with Daniel scheduled for today](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [Workflows ported over; start testing client workflows immediately](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [Pod testing sessions to be scheduled later this week](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Engineering team on standby for bug fixes and support](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [Expectation: Generate at least one client-ready piece of content per client by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
  - [Usage tracking implemented; feedback and bug reporting encouraged](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

### Audit Week Expectations

  - [Learn and leverage Atlas as the primary tool](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)
  - [Transition clients internally with handoff meetings](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1838.0)
  - [Build client roadmaps for strategic, proactive management](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1883.0)
  - [Complete assigned Linear project checklist](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)
  - [Use Linear for bug reporting and improvement requests](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1989.0)

### Strategic Shift in Client Management

  - [Move from reactive to proactive approach](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Raise the bar on deliverables using AI and programmatic tools](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1911.0)
  - [Focus on clear content strategy, client excitement, and publishing processes](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [Monitor key metrics: impressions, clicks, CTR, bounce rates](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [Regularly seek client feedback and address concerns promptly](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)

### Communication and Transparency

  - [Bi-weekly delivery org meetings planned for knowledge sharing and Q\&As](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)
  - [Emphasis on responsiveness and proactive communication with clients](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
  - [Encourage raising concerns early to prevent potential churn](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2295.0)
  - [Linear to be used as the source of truth for project management and issue tracking](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2008.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete Atlas training and start testing client workflows](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [Attend pod meetings and testing sessions as scheduled by directors](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)
  - [Review and complete assigned Linear project checklist](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)
  - [Prepare for client transitions and develop strategic roadmaps](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1883.0)
  - [Generate at least one client-ready piece of content using Atlas by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
  - [Shift to using Linear for bug reporting and improvement requests](https://fathom.video/share/chUHMrsCp5yMKxszmb1yCnZPys19q44Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1989.0)
